message:
feat(polyfills): add chunked requests, HTTP timeouts, async spawn, socket ref/unref

Phase 9 native polyfill improvements:

- HTTP chunked request decoding for incoming POST with Transfer-Encoding: chunked
- HTTP request timeout with actual abort via AbortController
- TLS rejectUnauthorized option passed to native layer
- True async child_process with native spawn/poll/kill functions
- Socket and Server ref()/unref() with event loop reference tracking
